evals.prompt: Build me a single-page personal landing page (name, tagline, 3 project cards, contact button) in Apple Liquid Glass style. Single HTML file, dark colorful background, the glass cards should actually refract the background like the iOS 26 icons do.
evals.expected_output: Single HTML file with SVG feDisplacementMap lens filter, canvas-generated displacement map, .lqg-style glass cards with dispersion rim + specular, vivid detailed background, works in Chrome

evals.prompt: 这是一个数据看板页面，帮我整页改成苹果液态玻璃风格，卡片要有真实折射感，不要只是毛玻璃模糊。
evals.expected_output: Existing page restructured: dark vivid background with detail layer, all cards converted to refractive glass (backdrop-filter url + displacement map), white text, original content preserved

evals.prompt: Make a macOS-style glass dock and a pill navbar component with liquid glass material — needs the rainbow edge dispersion and it must degrade gracefully in Safari.
evals.expected_output: Dock + navbar using shared lens filter, conic dispersion rim, CSS.supports feature detection with frosted-glass fallback for Safari
